title: Lumpen
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Lumpens''' were creatures used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Essentially balls of flesh and fur, lumpens were used as means of identification verification by the Yuuzhan Vong. When they were squeezed, they released bodily fluids onto a piece of leathery parchment that the Yuuzhan Vong could understand, thus confirming the identity of the being with the lumpen.<ref name="TUF">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
